Late_Blight: Apply Metalaxyl fungicide immediately. Remove infected leaves.
Early_Blight: Apply Mancozeb or Chlorothalonil. Remove lower infected leaves.
Bacterial_Spot: Apply Copper-based bactericide. Avoid overhead watering.
Leaf_Mold: Improve ventilation. Apply Chlorothalonil. Reduce watering.
Spider_Mites: Spray Neem Oil or Abamectin. Increase humidity. Irrigate immediately.
Septoria: Apply Mancozeb. Mulch around base. Remove infected leaves.
Yellow_Leaf_Curl: No cure. Remove plant. Use insect nets. Apply Imidacloprid for whiteflies.
Mosaic_Virus: No cure. Destroy plant. Sterilize tools with 10% bleach solution.
Healthy: No action needed. Conditions are optimal for tomato growth.
